---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement that still fits the app's preview-only philosophy
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the feature in one or two sentences.

## Problem

What reading workflow or pain point would this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest version of the change that would help.

## Why It Fits stillmd

Explain why this still feels preview-only, minimal, and quiet.

## Alternatives Considered

List simpler options or workarounds you already considered.
